codeReview.summary: The fix adequately resolves the prior failure by switching provenance to commit 8cca950, the first commit that actually contains the resolved-projection assertions scrutiny required. Reviewing both diffs shows the original cited commit 8c96475 only added parser-facing mixed-type coverage, while 8cca950 added the missing resolved parser-emitted object projection assertions and resolved determinism check that the prior review flagged.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fix worker followed the mission and AGENTS guidance to validate the DWG parser surface, but the repository-level .factory/services.yaml still points at DXF-oriented baseline commands instead of the DWG parser lane used by this mission. That mismatch can send verification-first workers to an irrelevant baseline unless they notice the mission-specific override.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Fix handoff verification ran cargo test -p h7cad-native-dxf -p h7cad-native-model -p h7cad-native-facade -- --test-threads=16 from .factory/services.yaml plus separate DWG-specific cargo commands, while mission AGENTS.md says semantic-type-coverage validation should use cargo check -p h7cad-native-dwg, cargo test -p h7cad-native-dwg -- --test-threads=1, and cargo check -p h7cad-native-facade.

summary: Pass: the provenance-only fix correctly addresses the original failure by citing commit 8cca950, which does contain the resolved mixed-type projection assertions and equivalent-layout resolved determinism evidence that were missing from the original cited commit 8c96475.
